ops.text: PRE-REGISTRATION E30.1 (retro-resolution of E29). Hypothesis: E29's null (FT decision model vs option-0 prior, n=202, observed +0.0297, instrument MDE 0.0499) was preordained by the instrument, not evidence against the model; the stored per-row predictions contain enough signal to classify the outcome. Data: E29's persisted per-row predictions (all systems + gold picks) under ~/.cc-steer/experiments/E29/, n=202 single-select decisions frame; NO new model calls, $0 cap. Method, computed exactly once: (1) 2×2 discordant table FT vs option-0 prior — b = FT right/prior wrong, c = reverse; (2) exact McNemar (two-sided binomial on b vs b+c); (3) session-clustered bootstrap CI on the accuracy delta (resample sessions, 10k reps, seed=30); (4) item-information audit — count unwinnable custom-pick items (gold = Other/custom) and zero-information items (all systems agree), no 2PL IRT (6 systems cannot identify it); (5) Beta(1,1) posterior on P(FT wins | disagreement), report P(θ>0.5). Pre-registered outcomes: RESOLVED WIN (McNemar p<0.05 with b>c AND clustered CI excludes 0); RESOLVED NULL (clustered CI within ±0.0499 and centered near 0 with b≈c); STILL UNDERPOWERED (neither) → carry n≈550–600 target into E30.2a/2b. Independent VERIFY lane recomputes b/c and McNemar from the raw artifacts. Analyst may not choose among outcomes post hoc — the mapping above decides.
